admin_2fa_sent_to: A verification code has been sent to
admin_session_timeout: You have been automatically logged out due to inactivity.
error_too_many_login_attempts: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.
error_account_locked: This account is temporarily locked. Please try again in {minutes} minutes.
error_2fa_send_failed: 2FA code could not be sent. Check the SMTP settings.
error_2fa_code_expired: Code has expired. Request a new code.
error_2fa_too_many_attempts: Too many failed attempts. Request a new code.
error_2fa_wait_seconds: Wait {seconds} seconds before requesting a new code.
tooltip_meta_title: Maximum 60 characters. This is what Google shows as the page title in search results.
tooltip_meta_description: Maximum 155 characters. The short description below the page title in Google.
tooltip_image_picker: Click to choose an image from the media library.
welcome_subtitle: Everything is set up. Here are the three things you'll do most often:
welcome_action_write_post_desc: Write a new article for your website.
welcome_action_edit_content_desc: Change texts, titles and images on your pages.
welcome_action_upload_image_desc: Add photos to your media library.
backup_download_desc: Download a ZIP with all data files (content, users, settings, forms, messages).
tooltip_backup_download: Download a copy of all content, settings and uploads. Store it in a safe place.
backup_tip: Tip: store backups in a safe place.
backup_restore_desc: Upload a previously downloaded backup ZIP to restore all data.
tooltip_backup_restore: Restore a previous backup. Note: this overwrites all current content and settings.
confirm_restore_backup: Are you sure? This overwrites all current data.
error_invalid_backup_no_data: Invalid backup: no data files found.
success_backup_restored: Backup restored. Data has been updated.
tooltip_blog_title: The title of your article. Also used as SEO title if you leave that empty.
tooltip_blog_summary: A short summary shown on the overview page. 1-2 sentences is enough.
tooltip_blog_content:
Write in HTML. Use

for paragraphs,

for subheadings, for bold, for links.
tooltip_blog_meta_title: Maximum 60 characters. Leave empty to use the article title.
tooltip_blog_meta_description: Maximum 155 characters. Leave empty to use the excerpt.
tooltip_blog_status: Draft articles are only visible in the admin panel. Published articles are visible to visitors.
tooltip_blog_category: Categories can be managed via the blog settings.
tooltip_featured_image: The featured image for this article. Shown on the overview page and at the top of the article.
tooltip_post_slug: The web address of this article. Automatically generated from the title. Only change if you have a good reason.
confirm_delete_page: Are you sure you want to delete this page?
error_invalid_slug_or_exists: Invalid slug or page already exists.
smtp_config_desc: Configure SMTP for reliable email delivery. Without SMTP, emails are sent via PHP's default mail function.
tooltip_smtp_enable: When disabled, emails are sent via the default PHP mail function. Enable SMTP for reliable email delivery.
tooltip_smtp_server: The SMTP server address. For Hostinger: smtp.hostinger.com. For Gmail: smtp.gmail.com.
tooltip_smtp_port: 465 for SSL (default for Hostinger), 587 for TLS (Gmail and most other providers), 25 for unencrypted (not recommended).
tooltip_smtp_encryption: SSL for port 465, TLS for port 587. Choose 'none' only if the provider requires it.
tooltip_smtp_username: Usually the full email address. For example: noreply@yourdomain.com
tooltip_smtp_password: The email account password. Stored encrypted.
hint_smtp_password_set: Password is set. Leave empty to keep the current password.
tooltip_smtp_from_email: The email address shown as sender. For example: noreply@yourdomain.com
tooltip_smtp_from_name: The name shown as sender. For example: Your Company Name.
smtp_test_desc: Send a test email to verify the configuration is correct.
smtp_gmail_app_password_warning: Use an App Password, not your regular password
tooltip_form_name: For internal use only. Visitors won't see this name.
tooltip_form_email_to: Submissions from this form will be sent to this address.
tooltip_form_confirmation: The text visitors see after submitting the form.
tooltip_field_type: Text = short input, Textarea = long text field, Email = with validation, Select = dropdown menu.
tooltip_field_required: When enabled, the form cannot be submitted without filling in this field.
tooltip_user_role: Admin has full access. Editor can manage content and blog but cannot change settings.
tooltip_2fa_smtp_required: Configure SMTP in Email settings first.
confirm_delete_user: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
error_email_in_use: Email address is already in use.
error_password_required: Password is required for new users.
error_2fa_requires_smtp: 2FA cannot be enabled without a working SMTP configuration. Configure Email settings first.
tooltip_color_primary: The main color for buttons, links and accents on the website.
tooltip_color_secondary: The color for highlights, prices and call-to-action elements.
tooltip_color_dark: The background color of the header and footer.
tooltip_font_display: The font for headings and titles.
tooltip_font_body: The font for body text and menu items.
tooltip_restore_legal: Reset the text to the default template with your company details filled in. Your current changes will be lost.
confirm_restore_legal: Are you sure you want to restore the default text?
hint_legal_empty: Leave empty to use the default template text.
media_drop_zone_label: Drag files here or click to upload
tooltip_media_upload: Drag images here or click to upload. Maximum 5MB per file. JPG, PNG, WebP and SVG.
media_allowed_types_hint: Max 10MB — JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG, PDF
tooltip_nav_label: The text visitors see in the menu.
tooltip_nav_url: The address the link points to. Choose an existing page or type an external address.
nav_auto_items_desc: These pages are automatically shown in the menu because 'Show in menu' is enabled in the page settings.
tooltip_page_title: The title of the page. Shown as heading at the top of the page.
tooltip_page_slug: The web address of this page. Automatically generated. Only change if you have a good reason.
warning_slug_change: Note: changing the slug breaks existing links. Set up a redirect.
tooltip_page_content:
The content of the page in HTML. Use

for paragraphs,

for subheadings, for bold, for links.
tooltip_seo_title: Maximum 60 characters. This is what Google shows as the page title.
tooltip_seo_description: Maximum 155 characters. The description below the page title in Google.
tooltip_page_status: Draft pages are only visible in the admin panel.
tooltip_page_template: Default = standard page. Contact = page with contact form at the bottom.
tooltip_page_parent: Make this a subpage of another page. Leave empty for a top-level page.
tooltip_show_in_menu: Check to automatically show this page in the main menu.
tooltip_menu_label: The text shown in the menu. Leave empty to use the page title.
tooltip_page_image: An optional featured image for this page.
pages_no_pages: No pages created yet. Create your first page.
confirm_delete_page_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this page?
error_page_has_children: This page has subpages. Delete the subpages first.
tooltip_redirect_from: The old web address that no longer exists. Starts with /. Example: /old-page
tooltip_redirect_to: The new web address visitors will be redirected to. Example: /new-page
redirect_info_text: Redirects are processed via PHP (not via .htaccess). Use relative paths, e.g. /old-path → /new-path.
tooltip_gtm_id: Google Tag Manager container ID. Starts with GTM-. Allows you to manage all tracking centrally.
tooltip_ga4_id: Google Analytics 4 tracking ID. Starts with G-. For website statistics.
tooltip_gsc_code: The Google Search Console verification code. Only the code, not the entire meta tag.
tooltip_gads_conversion_id: For measuring conversions from Google Ads campaigns.
tooltip_fb_pixel_id: For measuring website visits from Facebook and Instagram ads.
tooltip_custom_head: HTML or JavaScript placed in the <head> of every page. For advanced use only.
tooltip_custom_body: HTML or JavaScript placed just before </body>. For advanced use only.
cookie_banner_text: We use cookies to improve your experience. By using this site you agree to our
error_too_many_requests: Too many requests. Please try again later.
blog_meta_description: Read our latest blog posts and articles.
error_404_message: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
homepage_cta_text: Get in touch with us today for a free consultation.
setup_step1_subtitle: Enter your company details to get started.
setup_step2_subtitle: Choose the colors and fonts for your website.
setup_step3_subtitle: Customize the default texts for your website.
setup_step5_subtitle: Your EASEO CMS is ready to use. You can now log in to the admin panel.
setup_error_email_required: A valid email address is required.
setup_error_password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
tooltip_language_setting: The language of the admin panel and website interface.
